interface: BigQuery REST API v2, jobs.query and jobs.getQueryResults

body.useLegacySql: must be false — query parameters are only supported in GoogleSQL syntax
body.parameterMode: NAMED when queryParameters are present; omitted entirely otherwise
body.timeoutMs: server-side wait for job completion — the injected 'wait' in tests; the client never sleeps

parameters.scalar: {name, parameterType: {type: STRING|INT64|FLOAT64|BOOL|...}, parameterValue: {value: "<string form>"}} — every value is carried as a string, booleans as "true"/"false"
parameters.null_rule: a query parameter value can't be NULL — reject locally before any request
parameters.empty_array_rule: an empty array carries no element type to put in arrayType — reject locally

poll.jobComplete_false: the job is still running AND schema/rows are absent from the response — there is nothing to decode yet; keep polling jobs.getQueryResults with the jobReference (bounded by maxPolls)
poll.jobReference: {projectId, jobId, location} — location must be echoed as a query parameter on every getQueryResults call

pagination.pageToken: opaque continuation token; present when another page exists, absent on the final page; echo it as the pageToken query parameter and never rebuild or decode it
pagination.totalRows: STRING-encoded unsigned integer (can exceed 2^53) — parse to bigint, never Number()

rows_encoding.shape: rows: [{f: [{v: <cell>}, ...]}] — one f entry per schema field, in schema order
rows_encoding.repeated: a REPEATED cell is {v: [{v: <element>}, ...]}; an empty repeated cell is {v: []}
rows_encoding.integer: INTEGER/INT64 cells are decimal strings and can exceed Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER — decode to bigint
rows_encoding.float: FLOAT/FLOAT64 cells are numeric strings — decode to number
rows_encoding.schema: schema.fields: [{name, type, mode}] with legacy type names (INTEGER, FLOAT, BOOLEAN) on the wire

errors.job_level: a completed response may carry errors: [{reason, location, message}] — report these and fail BEFORE surfacing rows or following pageToken
errors.http_level: non-2xx responses carry {error: {code, message, status}} — surface code/message; never include the bearer token in error text

test_fixture_notes.token: dummy-bq-token-4471 (dummy; must never appear in error text)
test_fixture_notes.big_integer_probe: 9007199254740993 — one above Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; survives only as bigint
